SummaryOfDirectChrtblActyGrp.Description1Txt: PROVIDE HOUSING, SALARIES, VEHICLES, FRINGE BENEFITS, AND EQUIPMENT FOR 4 LAND STEWARDS TO MANAGE 9,800 ACRES AS HABITAT FOR AN ARRAY OF WILDLIFE SPECIES.
SummaryOfDirectChrtblActyGrp.Description2Txt: PROVIDE STEWARDSHIP TO 9,800 ACRES DEDICATED TO WILDLIFE AND NATURAL RESOURCES CONSERVATION INCLUDING FORESTRY MANAGEMENT, REPAIR AND MAINTENANCE OF DIKES, ROADS, AND WATER CONTROL STRUCTURES, AND PLANTING FOOD PLOTS.
SummaryOfDirectChrtblActyGrp.Description3Txt: PROVIDE SALARY AND FRINGE BENEFITS, VEHICLE, AND OFFICE FOR SENIOR SCIENTIST AND FOUNDATION DIRECTOR TO CONDUCT SCIENTIFIC RESEARCH STUDES, DEVELOP AND DELIVER EDUCATIONAL PROGRAMS IN WILDLIFE CONSERVATION, AND OVERSEE STEWARDSHIP OF THE NEMOURS PLANTATION.
SummaryOfDirectChrtblActyGrp.Description4Txt: PROVIDE HOUSING, SALARY, FRINGE BENEFITS, VEHICLE, AND OFFICE FOR 1 WILDLIFE BIOLOGIST TO CONDUCT SCIENTIFIC INVESTIGATIONS AND DELIVER EDUCATION PROGRAMS IN WILDLIFE CONSERVATION.

ApplicationSubmissionInfoGrp.FormAndInfoAndMaterialsTxt: LETTER STATING NATURE OF SCIENTIFIC RESEARCH, EDUCATIONAL PROJECT, AND/OR ENVIRONMENTAL STUDY.
ApplicationSubmissionInfoGrp.RestrictionsOnAwardsTxt: NEMOURS WILDLIFE FOUNDATION WAS CREATED TO PROVIDE AN ENVIRONMENT SUITABLE FOR RESEARCH, EDUCATIONAL PROJECTS, AND ENVIRONMENTAL STUDIES.

GrantOrContributionPdDurYrGrp.GrantOrContributionPurposeTxt: ASSIST IN GRANTMAKING, IMPACT INVESTING, AND SCHOLARSHIPS, AND LEAD INITIATIVES IN COLLABORATION WITH THE COMMUNITY.
TO PROMOTE & IMPLEMENT HABITAT IMPROVEMENT PROJECTS THAT BENEFIT FEDERAL TRUST SPECIALS.
TO RESTORE AND PROTECT FISH AND WILDLIFE HABITAT ON PUBLIC & PRIVATELY OWNED LANDS.
TO ASSIST IN DEVELOPING A CONSERVATION PLAN AND INSTALL/IMPLEMENT STRUCTURAL, VEGETATIVE, AND MANAGEMENT PRACTICES TO IMPROVE AGRICULTURAL LAND.
TO ASSIST IN DEVELOPING A CONSERVATION PLAN AND INSTALL/IMPLEMENT STRUCTURAL, VEGETATIVE, AND MANAGEMENT PRACTICES TO IMPROVE AGRICULTURAL LAND.
AMERICAN ALLIGATOR ECOLOGY IN HUMAN DOMINATED LANDSCAPES OF COASTAL SC.
TO BETTER UNDERSTAND BOBCATS HABITAT NEEDS & REQUIREMENTS.
MAPPING HISTORIC RICEFIELDS AND OTHER IMPOUNDMENTS IN THE COASTAL PLANS FOR SC.
HABITAT USE AND COMPETITION FOR WOOD DUCK NESTING BOXES BY BLACK-BELLIED WHISTLING DUCKS.
INVERTEBRATE BIOMASS AND COMMUNITY STRUCTURE ASSOCIATED WITH BRACKISH MANAGED TIDAL WETLANDS ALONG THE SC COAST.
WINTER HABITAT SECLECTION AND USE BY WHOOPING CRANES WITHIN THE EASTERN MIGRATORY POPULATION.
TO ENHANCE & PERPETUATE SOUTH CAROLINA'S WILDLIFE HERITAGE THROUGH EDUCATION & HABITAT CONSERVATION.
ACADEMIC MERIT SCHOLARSHIP FOR A STUDENT ATTENDING USC BEAUFORT.
PROVIDES IMPORTANT WINTER HABITAT FOR WATERFOWL. THE GOAL IS TO CONSERVE HABITAT TO SECURE THE FUTURE OF WATERFOWL IN SC.
TO CONSERVE CRANES AND THE ECOSYSTEMS, WATERSHEDS, AND FLYWAYS ON WHICH THEY PEND.
TO PROMOTE THE WELFARE AND FUTURE DEVELOPMENT OF CLEMSON UNIVERSITY.
DEDICATED TO FOREST CONSERVATION AND THE SUSTAINABLE USE OF NATURAL RESOURCES.
TO BEAUTIFY THE INTERSECTION OF AREA IN BEAUFORT COUNTY.
NEMOURS WILDLIFE SCHOLAR
AERIAL WATERFOWL SURVEY

RlnOfActyToAccomOfExmptPrpsGrp.RelationshipStatementTxt: THE PLANTATION HAS SIGNIFICANT BOTTOM LAND HARDWOOD FORESTS WHICH ARE IMPORTANT TO MIGRATORY WATERFOWL AND SERVE AS A FILTER TO IMPROVE WATER QUALITY IN BEAUFORT COUNTY. THE HARVESTING OF TIMBER FROM THE PLANTATION IS FOR THE SILVICULTURAL IMPROVEMENT OF THE PROPERTY AND TO ENHANCE THE QUALITY OF TIMBER RESOURCES LOCATED ON THE PLANTATION.

IN ORDER TO MAINTAIN THE ECOLOGICAL BALANCE OF THE PLANTATION, THE FOUNDATION GRANTS LEASES TO VARIOUS HUNTING CLUBS TO CONTROL THE DEER POPULATION. THE TOTAL NUMBER OF DEER PERMITTED TO BE HARVESTED ANNUALLY IS DETERMINED BY THE SOUTH CAROLINA FISH AND WILDLIFE AUTHORITY.

ContributorBusinessName.BusinessNameLine1Txt: KIAWAH ISLAND NATURAL HABITAT CONSERVANCE INC

GeneralExplanationGrp.MediumExplanationTxt: DECREASED ADJUSTED QUALIFYING DISTRIBUTIONS BY ($211,716). THE REDUCTION IS DUE TO REMOVING DEPRECIATION EXPENSE OF $199,852 AND ADDING $84,948 WHICH WAS THE FIXED ASSET ACQUISITIONS THAT WERE PURCHASED IN 2017 PLUS REMOVING $111,895 THAT WERE NOT DIRECTLY USED FOR EXEMPT ACTIVITIES.

INCREASED ADJUSTED QUALIFYING DISTRIBUTIONS BY $834,044. THE ADDITION IS DUE TO ADDING $359,856 WHICH WAS THE FIXED ASSET ACQUISITIONS THAT WERE PURCHASED IN 2016 PLUS OTHER PROGRAM SERVICES EXPENSES OF $474,188.
INCREASED ADJUSTED QUALIFING DISTRIBUTIONS BY $763,090 WHICH IS THE FIXED ASSET ACQUSITIONS. SEE TOTAL ACQUISITIONS ON DEPRECIATION REPORT.

GeneralExplanationGrp.IdentifierTxt: AMTS PD TO ACQUIRE ASSETS USED DIRECTLY
GeneralExplanationGrp.MediumExplanationTxt: ADDED THE FIXED ASSET ACQUISITIONS FROM THE DEPRECIATION REPORT OF $763,090. SEE TOTAL ACQUISITIONS ON DEPRECIATION REPORT.
INCREASED QUALIFYING DISTRIBUTIONS BY $763,090 OF FIXED ASSET ACQUSITIONS. SEE TOTAL ACQUISITIONS ON DEPRECIATION REPORT.
INCREASED ADJUSTED QUALIFYING DISTRIBUTIONS BY $763,090 OF FIXED ASSET ACQUSITIONS. SEE TOTAL ACQUISITIONS ON DEPRECIATION REPORT.
ADDED INFORMATION TO COLUMNS FOR 2017 & 2016 PLUS THE AMOUNTS NOT USED DIRECTLY FOR ACTIVE CONDUCT OF EXEMPT ACTIVITIES THAT CHANGED THE LINE 2E FOR ALL YEARS.
ADDED THE EXPENSES TO THE FOUR LARGEST DIRECT CHARITABLE ACTIVITIES DURING THE TAX YEAR.

InvestmentsCorporateStockGrp.StockNm: MERRILL LYNCH -20,000 SHS OF CHEMOURS CO
MERRILL LYNCH-64,100 SHS OF DOW DUPONT INC
